revisedPrompt:
Generate exactly one PNG image: a 128x96 pixel-art game asset sheet, 1 row x 1 column, one frame only. Solid #FF00FF chroma-key background fills every empty pixel; no gradients.

Subject: ONE small Japanese roadside shrine (hokora) as a single coherent field-prop object, front view, filling most of the 128x96 canvas while leaving a clear solid-magenta margin on every edge. A miniature wooden shrine hut on a stone base, with a tiny vermilion torii in front, a sacred rope with small white paper streamers across the eaves, and a softly glowing warm light visible inside the little door. Add moss on the stone, subtle dirt, grounding/contact shadow, uneven eaves, roof overhangs, trim, windows/door detail, varied roof and wall texture, asymmetric handmade details, bright mythical-Japan satoyama palette with muted matcha and moss greens plus vermilion and white accents.

Style: crisp high-resolution 16-bit SFC/SNES-style pixel art, low-resolution pixel clusters, no antialiasing blur, consistent palette, top-left light source, dark one-pixel outline where useful, cheerful bright colors. The object should read as one authored large prop that could later be sliced into 16x16 engine tiles, not repeated stamps. Preserve a clean readable collision footprint.

Hard cleanliness constraints: no cell separator lines, no grid lines, no frame borders, no frame numbers, no labels, no text, no watermark, no UI. No detached fragments: no isolated pixel islands, seam slivers, dust specks, residue, or stray marks. No modern objects, no weapons, no armor/helmet/ninja outfit, no horror mood, no dark gloomy palette, no companion creature or bird, no letter emblems, no protected franchise character/logo/likeness motifs. Solid #FF00FF only outside the single shrine object and its contact shadow.
